name: OS API Execution
description: Calls made by a process to operating system-provided Application Programming Interfaces (APIs). These calls are essential for interacting with system resources such as memory, files, and hardware, or for performing system-level tasks. Monitoring these calls can provide insight into a process's intent, especially if the process is malicious.

edr_and_sysmon.description: Captures API call traces for process access and memory allocation.

event_logs.description: A new process has been created (can indirectly infer API use).
A registry value has been modified (monitor registry-altering APIs).

debugging_tools.name: Process Monitor (ProcMon)
debugging_tools.description: Collect detailed logs of process and API activity.

debugging_tools.name: WinDbg
debugging_tools.description: Deep tracing of API executions in real time.

audit_frameworks.description: Capture system call usage that APIs map to.

runtime_monitors.description: Monitor system-level calls for API execution.

debugging_tools.description: Deep tracing of API executions in real time.

dynamic_analysis.description: Monitor API execution during malware detonation.

log_sources.Name: auditd:MMAP
log_sources.Channel: memory region with RWX permissions allocated

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: Rules capturing clock_gettime, time, gettimeofday syscalls when enabled

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: openat/read/ioctl: openat/read/ioctl on /dev/video* by uncommon user/process

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: mmap, ptrace, process_vm_writev or direct memory ops

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: unshare, mount, keyctl, setns syscalls executed by containerized processes

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: send, recv, write: Abnormal interception or alteration of transmitted data

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: mount system call with bind or remap flags

log_sources.Name: auditd:SYSCALL
log_sources.Channel: execve of dd or sed targeting /proc/*/mem

log_sources.Name: EDR:memory
log_sources.Channel:
API usage MFCreateDeviceSource, IAMStreamConfig, ICaptureGraphBuilder2, DirectShow filter graph creation
                from uncommon callers

log_sources.Name: EDR:memory
log_sources.Channel: Objective‑C/Swift calls to AVCaptureDevice/AVCaptureSession by non-whitelisted processes

log_sources.Name: EDR:memory
log_sources.Channel: VirtualAlloc/VirtualProtect/MapViewOfFile indicators via stack/heap activity and ImageLoad

log_sources.Name: esxi:hostd
log_sources.Channel: Remote access API calls and file uploads

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-Directory-Services-SAM
log_sources.Channel: api_call: Calls to DsAddSidHistory or related RPC operations

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process
log_sources.Channel: API tracing / stack tracing via ETW or telemetry-based EDR

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process
log_sources.Channel:
High-frequency or suspicious sequence of QueryPerformanceCounter/GetTickCount API calls from a
                non-standard process lineage

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process
log_sources.Channel:
api_call:
                UpdateProcThreadAttribute (PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_PARENT_PROCESS) and
                CreateProcess* with EXTENDED_STARTUPINFO_PRESENT / StartupInfoEx

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Process
log_sources.Channel: WriteProcessMemory: WriteProcessMemory targeting regions containing KernelCallbackTable addresses

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Windows-RPC
log_sources.Channel: rpc_call: srvsvc.NetShareEnum / NetShareEnumAll from non-admin or unusual processes

log_sources.Name: ETW:Token
log_sources.Channel: token_analysis: API calls such as DuplicateTokenEx or ImpersonateLoggedOnUser

log_sources.Name: fs:fsusage
log_sources.Channel: Detached process execution with no associated parent

log_sources.Name: linux:syslog
log_sources.Channel: Execution of modified binaries or abnormal library load sequences

log_sources.Name: macos:osquery
log_sources.Channel: open, execve: Unexpected processes accessing or modifying critical files

log_sources.Name: macos:osquery
log_sources.Channel: CALCULATE: Integrity validation of transmitted data via hash checks

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Invocation of SMLoginItemSetEnabled by non-system or recently installed application

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: application logs referencing NSTimer, sleep, or launchd delays

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Access decisions to kTCCServiceCamera for unexpected binaries

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: ptrace: Processes invoking ptrace with PTRACE_TRACEME flag

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel:
Calls to AuthorizationExecuteWithPrivileges() observed via Apple System Logger or security_auditing

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: access or unlock attempt to keychain database

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: Execution of input detection APIs (e.g., CGEventSourceKeyState)

log_sources.Name: networkdevice:syslog
log_sources.Channel: Unexpected reload, crashinfo, or boot message not tied to scheduled maintenance

log_sources.Name: NSM:Flow
log_sources.Channel: smb_command: TreeConnectAndX to \\*\IPC$ / srvsvc or Trans2/NT_CREATE for listing shares

log_sources.Channel: CLSID activation events where ProcessName=mmc.exe and CLSID not in allowed baseline
